nodes.body: <<FILL role=setup words=175 beats='Three friends find the old town clocktower locked, with a coded note pinned to the door; establish the cipher mystery and the friends'>>

choices.label: Examine the cipher note pinned to the door.
Search the building for another way in.
Find the old clockkeeper and ask for help.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=175 beats='The note is a substitution cipher; decoding the first line reveals a hint about a hidden key and a loose grate'>>

choices.label: Follow the clue to hunt for the hidden key.
Try the loose grate the note mentions.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=175 beats='A stiff side door and a high cracked window offer two ways in; mild tension, nothing dangerous'>>

choices.label: Shoulder the stiff side door open.
Climb up to the high window.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=175 beats='The gruff but kind clockkeeper warns the tower is tricky; offers to let them in, or to tell who built the cipher'>>

choices.label: Go inside with the keeper.
Ask who built the cipher.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=175 beats='Searching the steps, the friends find a brass key under a loose brick, exactly where the decoded clue pointed'>>

choices.label: Unlock the front door with the brass key.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=175 beats='The keeper explains the clockmaker hid a secret in the tower decades ago; useful background that makes later clues clearer'>>

choices.label: Head inside with what you have learned.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=175 beats='Squeezing through the high window is a small thrill; they drop safely onto a landing inside the tower'>>

choices.label: Drop down into the tower.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=175 beats='Bottleneck: inside the dim tower with a spiral stair, a clockmakers study, a swaying pendulum pit, and a dark basement; four ways onward'>>

choices.label: Climb the spiral stair.
Open the clockmaker's study.
Edge along the pendulum pit.
Go down to the basement.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=175 beats='The spiral stair climbs toward the clockface; a loose step hides a small gear-token they can pocket'>>

choices.label: Climb up to the great clockface.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=175 beats='The clockmakers study holds a cipher wheel that explains the code, plus stacks of tempting old logbooks'>>

choices.label: Take the cipher wheel up to the clockface.
Stay and read the fascinating logbooks.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=175 beats='A narrow ledge runs past the swinging pendulum; an oil can sits at the far end; mild peril, a careful crossing'>>

choices.label: Cross carefully and grab the oil can.
Decide the ledge is too risky and back out.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=175 beats='The basement holds the tower machinery and a service ladder that rises straight to the clockface'>>

choices.label: Take the service ladder up to the clockface.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=175 beats='Bottleneck: the giant clockface; the cipher must be set onto the hands; options to set it correctly, force it, search a back panel, or try random settings'>>

choices.label: Set the hands using the cipher.
Force the hands by guesswork.
Search for a back panel behind the face.
Spin the hands at random and hope.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=climax words=175 beats='Setting the cipher time exactly, gears click and a hidden panel slides open to reveal the vault; a triumphant beat'>>

choices.label: Step through to the vault.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=climax words=175 beats='Forcing the hands jams the gears with a screech; with the oil can they can free it, otherwise it stays stuck'>>

choices.label: Free the jammed gears with the oil can.
Give up; the gears will not move.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=175 beats='Behind the clockface is a second tiny cipher panel; solving it opens the vault, or reveals a hidden workshop instead'>>

choices.label: Open the panel into the vault.
Slip into the clockmaker's hidden workshop.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=175 beats='Bottleneck: the vault holds the clockmakers letter, a music-box automaton, and a small treasure; choose how to handle the secret'>>

choices.label: Decode the final message and bring it to the town.
Keep the clockmaker's secret among friends.
Stuff the treasure in your bag and run.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=failure words=160 beats='Lost in the logbooks, the friends look up to find the tower closing for the night; they leave clever but empty-handed, free to return; non-death, gentle'>>
<<FILL role=failure words=160 beats='Backing away from the pendulum, they decide some risks are not worth it; they go home safe, the cipher unsolved for now; non-death'>>
<<FILL role=failure words=160 beats='Random settings jam the whole mechanism; the closing bells ring and they must leave; the tower keeps its secret; non-death, a learning beat'>>
<<FILL role=failure words=160 beats='The forced gears stay jammed; the friends leave for the night, planning to come back with the right tools; non-death'>>
<<FILL role=completion words=170 beats='The hidden workshop is a wonder of half-finished clockwork; they become its quiet keepers; a warm, satisfying discovery'>>

<<FILL role=completion words=170 beats='The decoded message restores something lost to the town; the friends are quiet heroes and the clock runs true again; the main triumphant, series-advancing ending'>>
<<FILL role=completion words=170 beats='They keep the secret among themselves, a bond that is theirs alone; a happy, private ending'>>
<<FILL role=failure words=160 beats='Grabbing the treasure springs a harmless cage of jingling bells; the keeper finds them and they sheepishly put it all back; comic, non-death failure'>>
